missing_questions: minimum required input for launch planning
failure behavior when domain detail is absent
ambiguous_questions: How much domain-specific information may be inferred safely?
When should the skill stop and ask for clarification?
blocking_blind_spots: The request requires one skill to work across arbitrary domains without defining the minimum information boundary.
Proceeding without clarification would force the system to invent domain-specific planning logic.
safe_inference_allowed: The skill should aim for concise planning output.
The skill should support clarification as part of normal operation.
